Dropdown Optgroup

Dropdown with grouped options (optgroup headers) using <lyte-dropdown> Slyte DOM. Groups are separated by non-selectable headers within the dropdown list.

Form Figma Synced 4 Variants × 1 Size
Default — Grouped Options
Base
HTML
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select option" class="zc-dropdown zc-dropdown-optgroup">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-header class="zc-dropdown-optgroup-header">Group A</lyte-drop-header>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="a1">Option A1</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="a2">Option A2</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="a3">Option A3</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-header class="zc-dropdown-optgroup-header">Group B</lyte-drop-header>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="b1">Option B1</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="b2">Option B2</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
.zc-dropdown-optgroup-header {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-subtle, #6B7075);
  padding: 8px 12px 4px;
  pointer-events: none;
  user-select: none;
}
Default — With Pre-selected Value
Filled
HTML
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-selected="a2" class="zc-dropdown zc-dropdown-optgroup">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-header class="zc-dropdown-optgroup-header">Group A</lyte-drop-header>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="a1">Option A1</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="a2">Option A2</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-header class="zc-dropdown-optgroup-header">Group B</lyte-drop-header>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="b1">Option B1</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="b2">Option B2</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
/* Pre-selected value uses default lyte-dropdown rendering */
lyte-dropdown .lyteDDHeaderText {
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #37383C);
}
With Search — Filterable Grouped Options
Search
HTML
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select option" lt-prop-search="true" class="zc-dropdown zc-dropdown-optgroup">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-header class="zc-dropdown-optgroup-header">Fruits</lyte-drop-header>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="apple">Apple</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="banana">Banana</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="cherry">Cherry</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-header class="zc-dropdown-optgroup-header">Vegetables</lyte-drop-header>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="carrot">Carrot</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="broccoli">Broccoli</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="spinach">Spinach</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
/* Search enabled — group headers remain visible while items filter */
.zc-dropdown-optgroup lyte-drop-header.zc-dropdown-optgroup-header {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-subtle, #6B7075);
  padding: 8px 12px 4px;
  pointer-events: none;
}
Multi-Select — Multiple Grouped Options
Multi
HTML
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select options" lt-prop-multiple="true" class="zc-dropdown zc-dropdown-optgroup">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-header class="zc-dropdown-optgroup-header">Design</lyte-drop-header>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="figma">Figma</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="sketch">Sketch</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="xd">Adobe XD</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-header class="zc-dropdown-optgroup-header">Development</lyte-drop-header>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="react">React</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="vue">Vue</lyte-drop-item>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="angular">Angular</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
/* Multi-select with optgroup — headers are not selectable */
.zc-dropdown-optgroup lyte-drop-header {
  pointer-events: none;
  user-select: none;
  cursor: default;
}
/* Selected items render as tags in the header */
lyte-dropdown[lt-prop-multiple="true"] .lyteDDHeaderText {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 4px;
}
Disabled — Non-interactive
Empty
Filled
HTML
<!-- Disabled empty -->
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-placeholder="Select option" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-dropdown zc-dropdown-optgroup">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-header class="zc-dropdown-optgroup-header">Group A</lyte-drop-header>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="a1">Option A1</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>

<!-- Disabled filled -->
<lyte-dropdown lt-prop-selected="a1" lt-prop-disabled="true" class="zc-dropdown zc-dropdown-optgroup">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <lyte-drop-box><lyte-drop-body>
      <lyte-drop-header class="zc-dropdown-optgroup-header">Group A</lyte-drop-header>
      <lyte-drop-item data-value="a1">Option A1</lyte-drop-item>
    </lyte-drop-body></lyte-drop-box>
  </template>
</lyte-dropdown>
SCSS
/* Disabled state — lyte-dropdown handles disabled natively */
lyte-dropdown[lt-prop-disabled="true"] .lyteDDHeader {
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-disabled, #F5F5F5);
  border-color: var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: 0.65;
}
